channel.title: Articles on RatchatTowns' Game Corner
channel.description: Recent content in Articles on RatchatTowns' Game Corner

item.title: Writing Adventures With No Plot, but Rich Theme
item.description:
Introduction

I played the video game Outer Wilds in spring of 2025, and it’s still rattling around in my head. It will probably loom large over my playing and thinking about games for a long time.
